label: HIL Board Config
description: Configure PYNQ board connection for Hardware-in-the-Loop testing. Verifies SSH and Jupyter API connectivity.

parameters.label: Code
parameters.default:
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, 'hil/scripts')
from pynq_deploy import PYNQDeployer, HILBoardConfig

# Create board configuration
hil_config = HILBoardConfig(
    board_type='${board_type}',
    host='${host}',
    jupyter_port=${jupyter_port},
    password='${password}'
)

# Create deployer and check connection
${config_var} = PYNQDeployer(config=hil_config)
status = ${config_var}.check_connection()

print(f'Board: {hil_config.board_type}')
print(f'Host:  {hil_config.host}:{hil_config.jupyter_port}')
print(f'Jupyter API: {"OK" if status["jupyter"] else "FAILED"}')
print(f'SSH:         {"OK" if status["ssh"] else "FAILED"}')

if not status['connected']:
    raise ConnectionError(f'Cannot connect to PYNQ board: {status["info"]}')
